name: ABNORMAL INTRAABDOMINAL FLUID
dominant_finding: space between properitoneal fat and gut > 3 mm
distribution: round central density in pelvis + ill-defined bladder top
discriminating_features: round central density in pelvis + ill-defined bladder top
space between properitoneal fat and gut > 3 mm
Hellmer sign = medial displacement of lateral liver margins
medial displacement of ascending + descending colon
